steps.title: Spot the passage's central focus
steps.content: The passage describes hagfish's slimy threads and then shifts to the key point: Sato's team wants to recreate these threads in a lab as an eco-friendly alternative to petroleum-based fibers. The passage is ultimately about using hagfish threads to create new fabrics.

steps.title: Match the central idea to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice states the passage's main idea: the threads “might help researchers create a new kind of fabric.” This captures what Sato's team is doing—recreating the threads as an eco-friendly alternative to petroleum fibers.

The other three either contradict this direction, skip past the main point to address logistics, or invent an unsupported relationship the passage doesn't state.

That matches A.
